description: Vendor-template dir `Templates1/` (Sonnenhof-class canary — the primary Round-4 D-C-001 audit-finding target) contains template-demo code with a literal JWT-format string. Post-v0.15.4 D-C-001, the new `Templates*` glob in DEFAULT_IGNORE must cause walkFiles to skip this directory entirely — jwt-detector must NOT fire on vendor-template-demo files. Pre-v0.15.4 (RED-baseline) the scanner DOES fire because `Templates*` is not in the ignore-list; this canary codifies the fix-delta.
